description: G58 - RBP Reclass to Loss Reserves

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, TP, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL, TP, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, round(Amt2-Amt1,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set TP = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TP like 'F%'
update TransX set GL = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, TP, Amt1) (Select KeyID, '2218901' as GL, TP, round(sum(Amt1)-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, TP)
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, TP, Amt1) (Select KeyID, '5018901' as GL, TP, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2218901')
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, TP, Amt1) (Select KeyID, '2028901' as GL, TP, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2218901')
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, TP, Amt1) (Select KeyID, '5328901' as GL, TP, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2218901')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL = '' or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set GL = replace(GL,'89','00') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = ''
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Amt2 = ABS(Amt1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0

update TransX set Txt = 'Reclass RRP activity to Loss Reserves (paid loss)', PC = '5200000000', Contract = 'RRP Reclass', BusCat = '20', ReinLoc = 'UNKN', CC = '',ProdCode = '', UWYR = '', AccYr = '', ReinName = '', CatCode = '', RiskTerr = '', Broker = '', PTF = '', Stat = '', TransCode = '', TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TTY = '803' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '221%'
update TransX set TTY = '824' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '202%'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN', UWYR = '9999', AccYr = '9999',  RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '221%'
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('221','501')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP, TTY, Amt2,Amt3,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
